prompt: Create a dynamic 3D anime chibi character poster on a clean teal background, viewed from a high overhead three-quarter angle with strong studio lighting and a soft cast shadow. Show one cute demon-girl character named かなえちゃん: a small chibi body with an oversized head, glossy black twin ponytails whipping outward in long flowing arcs, two curved turquoise segmented horns, bright golden eyes, tiny fangs, round black sunglasses worn low on her face, and a playful confident smile. She wears a black satin sukajan-style bomber jacket with ornate embroidered golden dragon artwork across the back and sleeves, a short black pleated skirt, teal dragon-scale thigh-high stockings, dark shoes, and a thin reptilian tail with teal scales curling behind her. The pose should have her turned back over her shoulder toward the viewer, arms tucked near her chest, giving a cool mischievous idol-mascot feeling. At the bottom foreground, add one large piece of thick extruded Japanese 3D text reading かなえちゃん, in warm cream lettering with dark navy sides and a strong perspective shadow, angled upward across the lower edge. Use crisp cel-shaded anime rendering mixed with polished toy-like 3D depth, high detail in hair highlights, horn texture, dragon embroidery, and scale patterns, with a vivid turquoise color palette and no extra background objects.
